title: cratoxylum arborescens var. arborescens
intro: Cratoxylum arborescens var. arborescens is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Hypericaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cratoxylum arborescens var. arborescens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
